displayNameZh: 股权设计让 KOL 持续推广
summary: Yt Equity Design component for Remotion.
summaryZh: 适用于 Remotion 的「股权设计让 KOL 持续推广」组件。

artifact.usageMarkdown: Copy `remotion/yt-equity-design/src/YtEquityDesign.tsx` into your Remotion project, import `YtEquityDesign` and `ytEquityDesignDefaultProps`, then register the composition.
artifact.agentPrompt: Add the Yt Equity Design Remotion asset from remotionhub/remotionhub-assets at remotion/yt-equity-design to my project. Preserve the exported YtEquityDesignProps API and register the YtEquityDesign composition with the default props.
